title: AN ACT UPGRADING THE LAND TRANSPORTATION OFFICE (LTO) DAPA DISTRICT OFFICE INTO A CLASS "C" LTO DISTRICT OFFICE, RENAMING THE SAME AS SIARGAO LTO DISTRICT OFFICE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
Manila Bulletin, May 07, 2025 p.4

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 12183, May 02, 2025 ]

AN ACT UPGRADING THE LAND TRANSPORTATION OFFICE (LTO) DAPA DISTRICT OFFICE INTO A CLASS "C" LTO DISTRICT OFFICE, RENAMING THE SAME AS SIARGAO LTO DISTRICT OFFICE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The existing Land Transportation Office (LTO) district office in the Municipality of Dapa, Province of Siargao del Norte (LTO Dapa District Office) is hereby upgraded into a Class "C" LTO District Office and renamed as Siargao LTO District Office.

SEC. 2. The Secretary of Transportation shall immediately include in the Department's program the operationalization of the Siargao LTO District Office in the First District of the Province of Surigao del Norte, the initial funding of which shall be charged against the current year's appropriation of the LTO Dapa District Office.

Thereafter, such sums as may be necessary for the continued operation of the Siargao LTO District Office shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.)

FRANCIS "CHIZ" G. ESCUDERO

(SGD.)

FERDINAND MARTIN G. ROMUALDEZ

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act, which originated in the House of Representatives, was passed by the House of Representatives on August 9, 2023, amended by the Senate of the Philippines on December 18, 2024, and which amendments were concurred in by the House of Representatives on January 21, 2025.

(SGD.)

RENATO N. BANTUG, JR.

(SGD.)

REGINALD S. VELASCO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: MAY 02 2025

(SGD.)

FERDINAND ROMUALDEZ MARCOS JR.

President of the Philippines
